revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template should be used on Wikipedia tool pages (such as [[Wikipedia:Huggle|Huggle]] and [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]) to advise people to use it with caution. Add it as {{tlx|tool warning|''Name of tool''}}, using the parameter if the default title is not the correct title. You can also align this template by using |align=''alignment'', replacing ''alignment'' with left, right, or center (default). If you only wish to change the text alignment, use |textalign=''text alignment''. An |access= parameter is allowed; setting this to any value will add "or risk losing access to the tool" to the last sentence, intended for tools that utilize a blacklist for banned users or a whitelist for permitted users. === See also === * [[Wikipedia:Cleaning up vandalism/Tools]] (for a list of commonly used anti-vandal tools) {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Notice and warning templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[ja:Template:ツール警告]] }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing pages from wikipedia
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === This template should be used on Wikipedia tool pages (such as [[Wikipedia:Huggle|Huggle]] and [[Wikipedia:Twinkle|Twinkle]]) to advise people to use it with caution. Add it as {{tlx|tool warning|''Name of tool''}}, using the parameter if the default title is not the correct title. You can also align this template by using |align=''alignment'', replacing ''alignment'' with left, right, or center (default). If you only wish to change the text alignment, use |textalign=''text alignment''. An |access= parameter is allowed; setting this to any value will add "or risk losing access to the tool" to the last sentence, intended for tools that utilize a blacklist for banned users or a whitelist for permitted users. === See also === * [[Wikipedia:Cleaning up vandalism/Tools]] (for a list of commonly used anti-vandal tools) {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Notice and warning templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[ja:Template:ツール警告]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

If you only wish to change the text alignment, use |textalign=''text alignment''.
